positive: A breathtaking, highly detailed celestial map design featuring intertwined bioluminescent cosmic flora and fauna. The central composition showcases a majestic, stylized crescent moon cradling swirling nebula clouds in deep indigo and vibrant sapphire tones. Delicate, glowing star trails and abstract constellations connect the elements, forming a harmonious, symmetrical silhouette. The style is a blend of Art Deco symmetry and vaporwave psychedelic art, rendered with sharp, crisp linework and high contrast. Dramatic rim lighting emphasizes the glowing edges of the cosmic elements, making them pop against a dark, matte background. Perfect for a central, high-impact apparel print.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, cropped, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutation, noise, jpeg artifacts, amateur drawing, dull colors
